svg.text: Impact, Arial Black, Franklin Gothic Heavy
All caps · Letter-spacing: tight to wide · Weight: 900
Used for: Logo, Headlines, LIVE badges, Scores
CSS: font-family: Impact, 'Arial Black', 'Franklin Gothic Heavy', sans-serif
